arts.sum: Everton welcome Manchester City to Goodison Park for the 100th and final time this afternoon. arts.ttl: Man City ready to spend €200m on Kevin De Bruyne replacement
arts.sum: Man City are ready to have a busy summer transfer window on the back of a poor season, and midfield is one area that will be addressed. arts.sum: Manchester City travel to Goodison Park for the final time this afternoon to face Everton.
